title: JKG® 8 PACK STICKY FLY TRAP CATCHER - Super Sticky Killer Strips Tape | Catches Moth, Flies, Mosquitos, Wasp, Flying Insects Killer | Extra Sticky Indoor House & Garden Outdoor (Non-Toxic Papers)
bullet_points: ✅PACK OF 8 - Ensure you don't run out of these fly & insect sticky strip traps by purchasing our pack of 8! A must have for any household.

✅SUPER STICKY - The adhesive on our sticky housefly trap strips is super sticky to ensure effective catching of flies, moths, wasps, flying insects and mosquitos, whether indoor or outdoor in the garden.
✅NON TOXIC - Our insect & fly killer indoor use sticky paper is non toxic, so there's no baiting, no vapours no poisons and no mess! Insecticide free.
✅EASY TO USE - To use our fly catcher indoor or outdoor simply pull the string to pull out the strip and hang it anywhere you'd like!
